testcase.name: Portfolio App UI Tests › 1. Home page loads successfully
Portfolio App UI Tests › 2. Navbar is visible
Portfolio App UI Tests › 3. Theme toggle button exists and is clickable
Portfolio App UI Tests › 4. Hero section is visible
Portfolio App UI Tests › 5. Multiple sections render on page
Portfolio App UI Tests › 6. Page content includes portfolio data
Portfolio App UI Tests › 7. Scrollable page renders without errors
Portfolio App UI Tests › 8. Page has proper heading structure
Portfolio App UI Tests › 9. Navigation links are present
Portfolio App UI Tests › 10. Page responds to viewport changes
